rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Powershell Encoded Command Switch (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Powershell Encoded Command Switch (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 8446b07e-3088-403f-b93e-5a62d88e8dc5
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of powershell.exe with command lines that include
  variations of the -encodedcommand argument. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection
  Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/powershell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    CommandLine|contains: -e
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
